# isContinuousSpellCheckingEnabled

**Instance Property**

A Boolean that indicates whether the web view has continuous spell-checking enabled.

## Declaration

```swift
@MainActor var isContinuousSpellCheckingEnabled: Bool { get set }
```

## Discussion

[doc://com.apple.documentation/documentation/Swift/true] if the object has continuous spell-checking enabled; otherwise, [doc://com.apple.documentation/documentation/Swift/false].

## Getting and Setting Document Editing Attributes

- **isEditable**: A Boolean that indicates whether the user is allowed to edit the document.
- **smartInsertDeleteEnabled**: A Boolean that indicates whether smart-space insertion and deletion is enabled.
- **spellCheckerDocumentTag**: The spell-checker document tag for this document.
- **undoManager**: The receiver’s undo manager.
- **editingDelegate**: The receiver’s editing delegate.
- **editableDOMRange(for:)**: Returns the editable DOM object located at a given point.
